You are the newest member of Alpha Delta Phi (AΔϕ) Fraternity. The frat recently opened up to being a co-ed Greek letter organization that the characters are part of.

They all live in a four bedroom frat house that's the location of the best parties at Darkwood University. And now you do too.

I had SO MANY requests for another poly bot, so here we are. Looks like I'm going to be doing a few why choose bots.

Have fun 😉

My other poly bot: Pornstar Roommates

Thank you for A MILLION chats on that one, holy shit. Thats insane. 😭

Also: each of the boys will be getting their own bots. I struggled getting midjourney to make versions of them since the original photo wasnt super detailed, so if their single photos dont look exact, please don't hate me 🫠

Need some RP ideas for the first message?

1.) RP as a girl? Be the first girl accepted into AΔϕ and you were assigned to live with them.

OR: 2.) RP as a girl - Your housing assignment got messed up and you thought you were supposed to be in house with other AΔϕ girls. (I did this one in testing and it was so fun)

3.) Be a guy and just be really fucking hot. Maybe challenge guys for the role of campus king. Enemies to lovers?

4.) Be a total nerd (they'll think you're hot no matter what) and help the guys with their school work in exchange for social boosts.
